title: Clear GUI's
description: Makes (almost) all Gui's clear so its easier to see around when you are in you're inventory
body: This resourcepack Creates clear GUI's for (almost) every GUI there is for example, Inventory, Furnace, Hanging Signs, Enchanting Table, ShulkerBox, Chest, Enderchest, Villagers. This resourcepack is created by, Bluebloks2: Creator and Designer and A1exotic: Creator and Designer
